title: CSX Corporation (CSX)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on CSX using FY2024 actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what CSX is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-cqi4siuh>
Railroads generally grow at or slightly above nominal GDP due to their inflation-protected pricing power. Despite cyclical volume headwinds in some freight segments, CSX's ability to maintain high margins and control costs justifies a 5% medium-term growth assumption.

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).
